body: The bead implementation and focused tests pass, but the required repo-wide `lefthook run pre-commit` gate fails in `go-test` on an unrelated pre-existing integration test: `TestIntegration_ScriptHarness_FiveConcurrentBeads_AllLanded` in `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_integration_test.go`. The failure reports only 4 closed beads instead of 5 and `HEAD:bead-0003.txt` missing, plus harness warnings about deprecated `gpt-4o` / `turbo` settings. Fixing that test would require changes outside this bead's scope.

no_changes
rationale: status: needs_investigation
